heading: Reports on covered communications equipment or services
label: 1604 Reports on covered communications equipment or services

children.text: in the case of any covered communications equipment or service that is on the initial list published under , ; orsection 1601(a) of this titleAugust 14, 2018

in the case of any covered communications equipment or service that is not on the initial list published under , the date that is 60 days after the date on which the Commission places such equipment or service on the list required by such section.section 1601(a) of this title

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: b Rule of construction
children.text: If a provider of advanced communications service certifies to the Commission that such provider does not have any covered communications equipment or service in the network of such provider, such provider is not required to submit a report under subsection (a) after making such certification, unless such provider later purchases, rents, leases, or otherwise obtains any covered communications equipment or service.
a detailed justification for such action;
information about whether such covered communications equipment or service has subsequently been removed and replaced pursuant to ; andsection 1603 of this title
information about whether such provider plans to continue to purchase, rent, lease, or otherwise obtain, or install or use, such covered communications equipment or service and, if so, why.

children.heading: Proceeding
children.label: d Proceeding
children.text: The Commission shall implement this section as part of the rulemaking required by .section 1603(g) of this title
